audit_items.proof_trace: JWT authentication is enforced: ExecutionLayer always creates HttpJsonRpc via new_with_auth() with mandatory Auth struct (lib.rs:533), all Engine API calls including get_blobs_v1/v2 go through rpc_request() which injects bearer token (http.rs:661-663). Blobs from EL skip KZG via from_execution_verified() (blob_verification.rs:309) which is intentional trust boundary design—local EL is authenticated and trusted per spec.
